JAMES ROBERTSON. PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE AND SERVE ADDITIONAL DECLARATIONS NO LATER THAN 11/12/04; DEFENDANT'S REPLY SHALL BE FILED AND SERVED NO LATER THAN 11/18/04. COUNSEL SHALL FILE ADDITIONAL BRIEFING (4 PAGES) RE: 1) MISREPRESENTATION; AND 2) CASES WHICH HOLD THAT INDEPENDENT SALES AGENT'S ACTIONS ARE SUFFICIENT FOR JURISDICTION. PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE AND SERVE ITS BRIEF NO LATER THAN 11/15/04; DEFENDANT'S BRIEF SHALL BE FILED AND SERVED NO LATER THAN 11/18/04. COUNSEL SHALL PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF ALL PLEADINGS TO DEPT. 301. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; REPORTER: JOYCE LONG, CSR #8620.

LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT UNIQUE PIANOS, INC., ATLANTIC MUSIC CENTER, INC., ATLANTIC PIANO REBUILDERS, INC., PIANO LOVERS TOUR, INC., ATLANTIC MUSIC GROUP, INC., BRIAN GATCHELL, VIRGINIA GATCHELL, ALLEN GATCHELL AND LAWRENCE GATCHELL'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS: GRANTED. MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Nov-10-2004 Continued To Nov-23-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
J. Scott McKay, Esq., Boyd And McKay (415) 433-2700 for Defendant and Moving Party Unique Pianos, Inc., Atlantic Music Center, Inc., Atlantic Piano Rebuilders, Inc., Piano Lovers Tour, Inc., Atlantic Music Group, Inc. and Gatchell
Peter R. Chernik, Esq. (415) 387-7200 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Braude
Douglas P. Drayton, Esq., Bunting Drayton & Alward LLP (415) 617-0244 for Defendant and Cross Complainant Bombardier Capital, Inc.

RULING:
A R G U E D; DEFENDANT UNIQUE PIANOS, INC., ATLANTIC MUSIC CENTER, INC., ATLANTIC PIANO REBUILDERS, INC., PIANO LOVERS TOUR, INC., ATLANTIC MUSIC GROUP, INC., BRIAN GATCHELL, VIRGINIA GATCHELL, ALLEN GATCHELL AND LAWRENCE GATCHELL'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is CONTINUED to 11/23/04 in Dept. 301 before the Honorable A. James Robertson. Plaintiff shall file and serve additional declarations no later than 11/12/04; Defendant's reply shall be filed and served no later than 11/18/04. Counsel shall file additional briefing (4 pages) re: 1) Misrepresentation; and 2) Cases which hold that independent sales agent's actions are sufficient for jurisdiction. Plaintiff shall file and serve its brief no later than 11/15/04; Defendant's brief shall be filed and served no later than 11/18/04. Counsel shall provide courtesy copies of all pleadings to Dept. 301. (301/ajr/ds) Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR #8620
